---
output: html_document
---
<!--Just basic texts with <br> to separate text chunks with extra space but also includes hyperlinks to open access papers.-->

## Publications

<br>

#### $\underline{Published}$
<a href="https://www.mdpi.com/2071-1050/12/1/45/htm">Wind Power and Job Creation</a> - L.Aldieri*, J.Grafström, K.Sundström, P.Vinci.
